title: filago atlantica
intro: Filago atlantica, also known as Atlantic cudweed, is a perennial plant species native to the coastal regions of Europe and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, with its medicinal properties attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Filago atlantica include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, tinctures, and salves, although further research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential interactions with other medications.
